issue.title: decrypt.day

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://decrypt.day/app/id389801252](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fdecrypt.day%2Fapp%2Fid389801252) ### Comment > adguard gets detected, unable to use the website without disabling adguard. ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/476vt2ycpeyo0o8ksk0swkog88gkc0o8mvmrx00zu0.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.3.1.29 MV3 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Chrome Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Other:**
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion Filters last update: | 2026-04-12T09:00:43 Tracking protection: | disabled ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=ext&product_version=5.3.1.29&system_version=Windows+11&manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&filters=2.10&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&filters_last_update=2026-04-12T09%3A00%3A43)

comment.body: I made a pull request to fix it. not sure how long it will last before they detect it again, but we'll see.

comment.body: @ghajini 1. It seems to me that "**Advanced Settings → Block Java + Block Flash**" causes this problem, so if you only add "**@@||eslite.com^$stealth=flash**", the problem will still exist. 　 2. Add "**@@||eslite.com^$stealth=java**" to the allowed list.
